title: Competition-only RealMLP diversity expert
summary: Add a small-weight RealMLP expert trained without the original auxiliary data.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Keep the parent core unchanged, but add an extra RealMLP expert trained only on competition train folds, with validation still on competition folds. Blend it with a small fixed weight into the final prediction.
expected_effect: Add a less distribution-shifted neural expert that may improve public despite weaker solo CV.
risk: The competition-only expert may be dominated by the stronger auxiliary-trained core.
